title: <div><tt>| METHOD     | System Toolkits  | Syllabi, creative processes
content:
| METHOD | System Toolkits | Syllabi, creative processes |
| APPLICATION| Capstones | Cross-media projects, experimental studios |

Each project is a potential:
- Course
- Teaching method
- Case study

---

### IV. | BUSINESS / PRODUCT CODIFICATION

Your modular system has codifiable output forms. Examples:

| TYPE | FORMAT | BUSINESS USE |
|--------------------|--------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------|
| Narrative Projects | Books, Podcasts, Video Essays | Sales, subscriptions, grants, audience growth |
| Tools & Apps | Utilities, Language Processors | Freemium or indie creative monetization |
| Courses | PDFs, Zines, Online Classes | Community access or institutional licensing |
